C

ChatActivity - Class in com.example.musibox
The ChatActivity class provides a chat interface where users can send and receive real-time messages with their friends using WebSocket and retrieve old chat messages from a REST API.

connectWebSocket(String) - Method in class com.example.musibox.WebSocketManager
Initiates a WebSocket connection to the specified server URL.
CreateGroupActivity - Class in com.example.musibox
This activity allows the user to create a new group by selecting users from a list.
